traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.text: If damage would drop it to 0 HP, it can make a Con save (DC 5 + damage taken) instead to drop to 1 HP - fails automatically against radiant damage or a critical hit.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing an ability check.

traits.name: Web Sense
traits.text: While in contact with its web, knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: Ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

actions.name: Bite
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing damage plus 2d8 poison damage; on a failed DC 11 Con save the target takes half as much poison damage on a success and is poisoned for 1 hour if it drops to 0 HP from this poison, falling unconscious instead while poisoned this way.

actions.name: Web (Recharge 5-6)
actions.text: Ranged attack, +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft.; on a hit the target is restrained by webbing (AC 10, 15 HP, vulnerable to fire, immune to bludgeoning/poison/psychic) until it escapes or the web is destroyed.

actions.name: Blood Drain
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 1d4+3 piercing damage and the stirge attaches to the target, automatically dealing this damage again each of its turns until removed (AC 10 to pull off) or the target is drained of blood.

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.text: As a bonus action, can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 1d12+3 slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.text: Melee or ranged weapon attack, +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., 1d6+3 piercing damage.

traits.name: Martial Advantage
traits.text: Once per turn deals an extra 2d6 damage to a target it hits with a weapon attack if an ally is within 5 ft. of that target and not incapacitated.

actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +3 to hit, 1d8+1 slashing damage (1d10+1 two-handed).

traits.name: Brute

traits.name: Ooze Cube
traits.text: Nearly invisible until it's moved or attacked or a light is shone on it - a DC 15 Perception check spots the swirling movement inside it and a faint discoloration of the walls/floor it's engulfing.

traits.name: Transparent
traits.text: Even when discovered, it can be mistaken for a wet floor - a creature that fails a DC 15 Perception check while within 5 ft. and not already aware of it enters its space, becoming trapped and taking its acid damage automatically.

traits.name: Engulf
traits.text: Moves into a hostile creature's space; the target can make a DC 12 Dex save to avoid it, and on a failed save is engulfed - taking 3d6 acid damage, unable to breathe, restrained, and taking the acid damage again each of the cube's turns unless it escapes (climbing out costs the cube's whole move).

traits.text: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

traits.name: Split
traits.text: When hit by lightning or slashing damage while at more than 10 HP, splits into two new jellies (each with half the HP, rounded down) if there's space - a jelly with 10 HP or less can't split.

traits.name: Corrode Metal
traits.text: Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits it corrodes; after dealing damage, a slashing/piercing metal weapon takes a permanent -1 penalty (destroyed at -5); nonmagical ammunition is destroyed after dealing damage.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +3 to hit, 2d6+1 acid damage, and if the target is wearing nonmagical metal armor it corrodes, taking a permanent -1 AC penalty (armor destroyed at -10).

traits.text: Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits it corrodes, taking a permanent -1 penalty (destroyed at -5); nonmagical metal ammunition is destroyed after dealing damage.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing an ability check.

statBlock.speed: 30 ft. (40 ft., climb 30 ft. in wolf/hybrid form)
statBlock.damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical, non-silvered weapons (in wolf/hybrid form)

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.text: Can shift between humanoid, wolf, and wolf-humanoid hybrid as a bonus action - equipment isn't transformed.

traits.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
traits.text: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

actions.name: Multiattack (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.text: In humanoid form makes two melee attacks; in hybrid form makes one bite attack plus either one claw or one weapon attack.

actions.name: Bite (Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +4 to hit, 2d4+2 piercing damage; a humanoid hit must succeed a DC 12 Con save or be cursed with werewolf lycanthropy.

actions.name: Claws (Hybrid Form Only)
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +4 to hit, 2d4+2 slashing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.text: Melee or ranged weapon attack (humanoid form only, or hybrid without claws that turn), +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., 1d6+2 piercing damage (1d8+2 two-handed).

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.text: Can use an action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form; stats are the same in any form.

traits.name: Adhesive
traits.text: While in object form, anything that touches it (or hits it in melee) sticks to it, becoming grappled (escape DC 13) unless it's a Huge+ creature.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.text: While it stays motionless in object form, indistinguishable from a normal object.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 1d8+3 bludgeoning damage; if the mimic is in object form the target is subject to its Adhesive trait.

actions.name: Bite
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing damage plus 1d8 acid damage.

traits.name: Iron Scent
traits.text: Can pinpoint ferrous metal within 30 ft.

actions.name: Bite
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +3 to hit, 1d8 piercing damage; any nonmagical ferrous weapon that hits it corrodes (-1 per hit, destroyed at -5, unless it's a magical weapon).

actions.name: Antennae
actions.text: Melee weapon attack against a target wearing nonmagical ferrous armor, +3 to hit, no damage but the armor rusts and takes a permanent -1 AC penalty (discarded/destroyed at -10, or if 0 AC leaves the wearer needing new armor); can instead corrode a held nonmagical ferrous weapon or metal shield the same way.

traits.name: Petrifying Gaze
traits.text: When a creature within 30 ft. starts its turn looking at the basilisk (and doesn't avert its eyes), it must succeed a DC 12 Con save or begin turning to stone, restrained and repeating the save at the end of its next turn - success ends the effect, failure turns it permanently to stone until freed by greater restoration or similar magic. A creature that can see the basilisk can avert its eyes at the start of its turn to avoid the save that turn, at the cost of disadvantage on attacks against the basilisk until its next turn.

actions.name: Bite
actions.text: Melee weapon attack, +5 to hit, 2d6+3 piercing damage plus 2d6 poison damage.
